name: The Color
description: Convert a hexadecimal color into named color data or generate a related color scheme.

tools.name: identify_color
tools.description: Get conversions, a matched name, contrast information, and image links for a hexadecimal color.

params.name: hex
params.description: Valid hexadecimal color code without the leading hash, for example 0047AB.

tools.name: generate_scheme
tools.description: Generate a color scheme from a hexadecimal seed color.

params.name: hex
params.description: Valid hexadecimal seed color without the leading hash.

params.name: mode
params.description: Scheme mode: monochrome, monochrome-dark, monochrome-light, analogic, complement, analogic-complement, triad, or quad; defaults to monochrome.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of colors to return; defaults to 5.
